name: mistakebook-skills
description: 错题集 / 记事本 Skill。识别用户进入纠错状态或主动记录事项的状态，强制执行“整理-确认-归档-记忆刷新”闭环，并在多次纠错仍失败时自动升级到飞升模式（Ascended Mode）。

plugins.name: mistakebook
plugins.description: 错题集 / 记事本 Skill for Claude-style plugin hosts. Includes lightweight scholar preflight on fresh tasks, automatic correction detection hooks, notebook capture hints, Ascended Mode escalation, session restore, manual /mistakebook / notebook / ascended routing, detailed entry archiving, and project/global cache-memory refresh.
